vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #565

plan.title: spec-validate: v0.6 envelope message + wire VALID_VBRIEF_VERSIONS into check (P2 cleanup)

narratives.Description: spec-validate: v0.6 envelope message + wire VALID_VBRIEF_VERSIONS into check (P2 cleanup)
narratives.Problem: scripts/spec_validate.py near line 155 emits a stale 'Migrate to vBRIEF v0.5 envelope' string after the v0.6 strict tightening. Additionally, the VALID_VBRIEF_VERSIONS frozenset is now unused after a Greptile-driven inline simplification; should be re-wired to share the version-check pattern with vbrief_validate.py for future-proofing.
narratives.Acceptance: Update the legacy-flat-format error message from 'v0.5 envelope' to 'v0.6 envelope'. Wire VALID_VBRIEF_VERSIONS frozenset into the version check (Option B in the issue) so spec_validate.py matches vbrief_validate.py. Update any test asserting error-message content.
narratives.OutOfScope: Functional behavior of the validator (cosmetic/maintainability cleanup only). Greptile already rated the prior PR #563 5/5 'safe to merge'.

items.title: Update legacy-flat-format error message in scripts/spec_validate.py: v0.5 envelope -> v0.6 envelope
Wire VALID_VBRIEF_VERSIONS frozenset into the version check (Option B)
Update tests that assert the legacy error-message content

references.title: Issue #565: spec-validate: v0.6 envelope message + wire VALID_VBRIEF_VERSIONS into check (P2 cleanup)
